---
name: Implement Task
description: "Implement TASK-xxxxx theo TDD, coverage gate, va performance scan."
argument-hint: "TASK-00002"
agent: agent-developer
tools: [read, search, edit, execute, todo]
---
Thuc hien workflow `/implement-task` cho TASK ID duoc truyen vao.

Yeu cau:
1. Verify TASK yaml da co trong git.
2. Tuan thu branch policy va TDD cycle.
3. Chay test + coverage gate + performance scan.
4. Bao cao ket qua va technical debt (neu co).
